# QoF v1.3.0's "In Sync" Update

> [!NOTE]
> A Minecraft Bedrock addon that adds small vanilla-friendly features. Each module is configurable through the in-game pack settings panel. Requires **BetaAPIs** enabled under Experiments.

## Pack Info

Full changelog: [v1.3.0](https://github.com/aitji/QoF/commits/v1.3.0) or [compare](https://github.com/aitji/QoF/compare/v1.2.0...v1.3.0) Releases: [v1.3.0](https://github.com/aitji/QoF/releases/tag/v1.3.0) LICENSE: [MIT](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/aitji/QoF/refs/heads/behavior_packs/LICENSE)\
Release Date: [Mar/28/2026 (09:51:30)](https://time.is/Unix_time_converter/1774691490)

Base Game Version: [26.10 Tiny-Takeover](https://feedback.minecraft.net/hc/en-us/articles/44418129038733-Minecraft-Bedrock-Edition-26-10-Tiny-Takeover)\
Dependency: [2.7.0@beta](https://www.npmjs.com/package/@minecraft/server/v/2.7.0-beta.1.26.10-stable)

## Changelogs

- Update base game version to [26.10 Tiny-Takeover](https://feedback.minecraft.net/hc/en-us/articles/44418129038733-Minecraft-Bedrock-Edition-26-10-Tiny-Takeover)
- Update Script API to [2.7.0@beta](https://www.npmjs.com/package/@minecraft/server/v/2.7.0-beta.1.26.10-stable)
- Fully rebrand from `QoL (Quality of Life)` to `QoF (Quality of Feature)`
- Add patch notes to every [changelog](https://github.com/aitji/QoF/tree/behavior_packs/.github/changelogs)

### Carried Container

- Add a config option to allow climbing scaffolding and ladders
  `note: we already have settings for allowing jumping in water & lava`

### Crop / Harvest

- Crop (`crop.js`) is now renamed to Harvest (`harvest.js`)
- When seeds drop on the ground and the player has no seeds, the dropped seeds used for replanting are reduced by 1. The remaining seeds will have a `40 gametick` delay before the player can pick them up again.

> bug ref
>
> - Fix crop seed loss logic missing inverse sign
> - Fix beetroot using wheat seeds when replanting

### Dynamic Light

- Move from `minecraft:light_block` to `qof:light_block` for more customization
- Sea pickle now only works underwater
- Some items are now prevented from emitting light underwater

| Item               | Reaction                        | Level |
| ------------------ | ------------------------------- | ----- |
| Campfire           | Won't emit light underwater     | 15    |
| Lantern            | Won't emit light underwater     | 15    |
| Lava Bucket        | Won't emit light underwater     | 15    |
| All Copper Lantern | Won't emit light underwater     | 15    |
|                    |                                 | <br>  |
| Torch              | Won't emit light underwater     | 14    |
| Copper Torch       | Won't emit light underwater     | 14    |
|                    |                                 | <br>  |
| Soul Campfire      | Won't emit light underwater     | 10    |
| Soul Lantern       | Won't emit light underwater     | 10    |
| Soul Torch         | Won't emit light underwater     | 10    |
|                    |                                 | <br>  |
| Redstone Torch     | Won't emit light underwater     | 7     |
|                    |                                 | <br>  |
| Sea Pickle         | **Only** emits light underwater | 6     |

> bug ref
>
> - Fix dynamic light preventing crop seeds from being placed on farmland
> - Fix incorrect sound when placing nether wart on soul sand with dynamic light on top
> - Fix piston pushing light blocks
> - using hoe/shovel on dirt-type blocks no longer consumes durability in creative mode
> - Fix visual bug where Minecraft displays destroy particles for light blocks
> - Fix flint & steel and fire charge not working with items emitting light on the ground

### Offhand

- Double sneak window gap is now customizable on `Mobile`, `Console`, and `Windows`
- Add more torch types for offhand placement

| List of torch placement |
| ----------------------- |
| Torch                   |
| Redstone Torch          |
| Copper Torch            |
| Soul Torch              |

> bug ref
>
> - Fix offhand incorrectly reading enabled value from carried container module
> - Fix torch duplication when spam clicking
> - double sneak for offhand now resets `lastSneakTick` after swapping items

### Wet Concrete Powder

- Add `BASE` setting for how long before concrete powder hardens in water
- Add `MULTIPLIER` setting to scale the conversion time for concrete powder hardening in water

These settings are used in the formula:

$$ \text{DELAY} = BASE + \lfloor \sqrt{item_amount - 1} \cdot MULTIPLIER $$

### Composter+

> bug ref
>
> - Fix composter not detecting when moved by piston

### Bug Fixes

- Fix offhand incorrectly reading enabled value from carried container module
- Fix crop seed loss logic missing inverse sign
- Fix torch duplication when spam clicking
- Fix beetroot using wheat seeds when replanting
- Fix dynamic light preventing crop seeds from being placed on farmland
- Fix incorrect sound when placing nether wart on soul sand with dynamic light on top
- Fix piston pushing light blocks
- Using hoe/shovel on dirt-type blocks no longer consumes durability in creative mode
- Fix visual bug where Minecraft displays destroy particles for light blocks
- Fix composter not detecting when moved by piston
- Double sneak for offhand now resets `lastSneakTick` after swapping items
- Fix flint & steel and fire charge not working with items emitting light on the ground

# Pre-release Changelogs (v1.2.x)

All updates from pre-releases are included in the v1.3.0 release.

<details>
  <summary><strong>v1.2.1 <a href="https://github.com/aitji/QoF/releases/tag/v1.2.1">Take me there</a></strong></summary>

## v1.2.1

### Bug Fixes

- Wrapped `debug message` on startup to `DEBUG` mode
- Removed `debug message` from Dynamic Light
- Fixed some `technical debt` in `config.js` that might lead to misunderstandings in the future
- Fixed a bug in `Carried Container` where player jump was not correctly set to `true` when hitting an edge case

</details>

<details>
  <summary><strong>v1.2.2 <a href="https://github.com/aitji/QoF/releases/tag/v1.2.2">Take me there</a></strong></summary>

## v1.2.2

### Mob Loot+

Add mob loot to previously unlootable mobs

#### 1. Sniffer Drop `Moss Block`

$$ P(Drop) = 1 $$

> Looting won't affect the drop range

#### 1. Piglin Brute Drop `Gilded BlackStone`

$$ P(Drop) \in \langle 0, 1 \rangle $$

> Looting won't affect the drop range

### Recipe+

A more accessible way to obtain items

#### 1. Stripped Block of Bamboo to Charcoal (`Furnace`)

<div align="center">
  <img src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/aitji/QoF/refs/heads/behavior_packs/.github/img/v1.2.2/charcoal-bamboo2.png" alt="Smelting stripped bamboo block to charcoal in furnace">
</div>

**alt-text**: Smelting stripped bamboo block to charcoal in _furnace_

#### 2. Dirt with Root to Rooted Dirt (`Crafting Table`)

<div align="center">
  <img src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/aitji/QoF/refs/heads/behavior_packs/.github/img/v1.2.2/rooted_dirt.png" alt="Dirt & Root craft to Rooted Dirt in crafting table">
</div>

**alt-text**: `Dirt & Root` craft to `Rooted Dirt` in _crafting table_

> [!NOTE]
> Recipes might be changed in the future update

#### 3. Skull with Paper to Banner Pattern (`Crafting Table`)

<div align="center">
  <img src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/aitji/QoF/refs/heads/behavior_packs/.github/img/v1.2.2/skull.png" alt="Skull & Paper craft to Banner Pattern in crafting table">
</div>

**alt-text**: `Skull & Paper` craft to `Banner Pattern` in _crafting table_

Fix

- `stone_slab` to `normal_stone_slab`

Removed

- Rotten Fresh Hide (`Furnace, Smoker, Campfire, Soul Campfire`)
- Charcoal to Block of Coal (`Crafting Table`)

### Configs

- Offhand is now configurable through in-game world settings

### (New) Offhand

- Allow players to double sneak to swap the behavior_packs hand and offhand
- `work as intend` Enchantments and item color still cannot be transferred due to `API limitations` that do not allow editing the offhand cleanly

### (New) Harvest

- Allow players to hold a hoe and harvest crops with automatic seed replanting
- Hoe will lose durability\* when destroying the crop in order to balance auto replanting\
  \* Durability is calculated based on the real Minecraft formula $\mathrm{Loss} = \mathrm{random} < \frac{1}{\mathrm{level} + 1}$

### Composter+

- Composter no longer uses a hard-coded vanilla list to check if an item is compostable, and now uses the official compostable item component
- Added bowl return logic inside hopper logic

### Dev Side & Bug Fixes

- Fixed grammar in `manifest.json`
- Fixed concrete powder trying to spawn items in an unloaded chunk
- Fixed light blocks trying to place in an unloaded chunk
- Fixed shovel and hoe not working when a light block is above dirt-type blocks
- Bumped `@minecraft` in `package.json` from `^2.5.0` to `^2.6.0-beta.1.26.3-stable`, giving developers more tools to work with

</details>

<details>
  <summary><strong>v1.2.3 <a href="https://github.com/aitji/QoF/releases/tag/v1.2.3">Take me there</a></strong></summary>

## v1.2.3

- Re-branding from `QoL (Quality of Life)` to `QoF (Quality of Feature)`

> [!NOTE]
> No need to update to this version yet. This change only introduces the rebranding.
>
> We are preparing for `v1.3.0`. You can follow the progress on the main branch (`behavior_packs (main)`, `resource_packs`), but pre-releases are currently highly suppressed ;\)

</details>

> [!NOTE]
> Older releases&pre-releases can be found [here](https://github.com/aitji/QoF/releases)
